---
name: Feature request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for the luguo CLI / 为 luguo CLI 提一个新功能或改进
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve? / 你想解决什么问题
Describe the situation you hit, not just the solution. / 描述你遇到的场景，而不是直接给方案。

## Proposed feature / 期望的功能
What should the CLI do? / 你希望 CLI 怎么做？

## Alternatives / 替代方案
How do you work around it today? / 你目前是怎么绕过的？

## Additional context / 补充信息
Example commands, related issues, references. / 示例命令、相关 issue、参考链接等。
